description: Defines styling options for a specific geospatial features resource.

featureSymbology.description: Defines how geospatial features are styled. Supports simple (uniform), category-based (attribute matching), and interval-based (numeric range) symbology.

ExpressionOrConditions.description: A single JSEP expression string, or a conditions object with an ordered array of condition entries.

conditions.description: Condition-based expression: array of condition entries evaluated in order. Use 'true' as the last condition for a default/fallback.

condition.description: A JSEP expression that is evaluated to determine if this entry matches.

value.description: The result expression to use when the condition matches.

label.description: Optional human-readable label for this condition.

StyleExpression.description: Wraps an expression or conditions with optional reusable variable definitions.

value.description: The expression value: either a JSEP expression string or a conditions object.

defines.description: Reusable named variables that can be referenced in expressions and conditions.

StringOrExpression.description: A string literal or a JSEP expression string that evaluates to a string.

NumberOrExpression.description: A numeric literal or a JSEP expression string that evaluates to a number.

ColorOrExpression.description: An RGB(A) color object or a JSEP expression that evaluates to a color at runtime.

type.description: Indicates this is a line symbol.

color.description: Color of the line. Can be a literal RGB(A) color or an expression.

width.description: Width of the line in pixels. Can be a literal number or an expression.

FillSymbol.description: Symbol definition for rendering filled areas.

type.description: Indicates this is a fill symbol.

color.description: Fill color of the area. Can be a literal RGB(A) color or an expression.

outline.description: Optional outline symbol for the filled area.

ShapeMarkerSymbol.description: Symbol definition for shape-based point feature markers.

type.description: Indicates this is a shape marker symbol.

size.description: Size of the marker in pixels. Can be a literal number or an expression.

fill.description: Fill symbology applied to the marker shape.

FeatureSymbol.description: A symbol used to render a geospatial feature. Can be a line symbol, fill symbol, or shape marker.

SimpleSymbology.description: Applies a single symbol uniformly to all features.

type.description: Discriminator. Indicates simple symbology where a single symbol is applied uniformly to all features.

symbol.description: The symbol applied uniformly to all features.

CategorySymbology.description: Styles features by matching an attribute value to a set of predefined categories.

type.description: Discriminator. Indicates category-based symbology where features are styled by matching attribute values.

valueSource.description: Attribute name or expression that resolves to the value used for category matching.

defaultSymbol.description: Default symbol applied when no category value matches.

categories.description: Array of value-to-symbol mappings. Each entry defines a value to match and the symbol to apply.

value.description: The literal value to match against the valueSource result.

symbol.description: Symbol to apply when this category matches.

displayName.description: Optional human-readable name for this category.

IntervalSymbology.description: Styles features by mapping a numeric attribute value to a set of defined ranges.

type.description: Discriminator. Indicates interval-based symbology where features are styled by numeric value ranges.

valueSource.description: Attribute name or expression that resolves to the numeric value used for interval matching.

defaultSymbol.description: Default symbol applied when no interval range matches.

intervals.description: Array of numeric range-to-symbol mappings. Each entry defines a value range and the symbol to apply.

minValue.description: Optional lower bound of this interval. If omitted, the interval extends to negative infinity.

symbol.description: Symbol to apply when the value falls within this interval.

displayName.description: Optional human-readable name for this interval.
